context: User shares a documentation URL and asks to save it for a specific project

checklist.name: Passes the correct URL
checklist.description: The command passes `https://stripe.com/docs/webhooks` as the URL argument

checklist.name: Uses --project flag
checklist.description: Scopes the fetch with `--project payments-api` (or similar identifier)

checklist.name: Does not specify --tier
checklist.description: Does NOT add a `--tier` flag (tier is automatically set to semantic by the command)

checklist.name: Correct URL quoting
checklist.description: The URL is properly quoted in the command

checklist.name: Single command
checklist.description: Produces a single vault-cli fetch command (not multiple steps)
